name: national_security_newsroom_s_automated_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A National Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving national security newsroom s automated oakline tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Gideon Dubois
agents.identity: I am Gideon Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in National Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Kaito Sato
agents.identity: I am Kaito Sato, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in National Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Gideon Dubois must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Gideon Dubois do?
